title: Spryzeen's Knight Armor
body:
## BEDROCK PORT HERE -> https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/spryzeen-s-knight-armor-bedrock-edition
# Spryzeen's Knight armors
![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EwJHG2NA/images/562ebbabd9990acb728d546bcd3f61eb8f6fb2a8.jpeg)

Armors are very important objects in the game and that is why we always see them in the same way and with this texture pack that will change completely

Spryzeen's Knight Armor is a texture pack that gives a medieval aspect while being rude and interesting to the armors
removing the full body armor and making them appear to be divided into several parts

it looks very well with elytras, seems like it has chestplate

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Full vanilla texture pack, you don't need any mod or something
- High improvement to all armors
- Chainmail looks a lot better!, maybe don't protect a lot but it can be a very god knight statue
- Full compatibility with armor trims and dyed leather armor
- Armor items have changed too
- Special chestplated-elytra support

</details>

<details>
<summary>Glowing armor trims guide</summary>
  
 - Vanilla, use it with XXVI' shiny armor trims, make sure to download the vanilla versión and put it below knight armor resource pack (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xxvis-shiny-armor-trims)
 - Complementary Shaders, go to video settings > shaderpacks > materials > IntegratedPBR+ Materials > Glowing stuff > Glowing armor trim and activate it (https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

- None!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

- None!

</details>
